name: Sebastian | Serial Killer Husband
description:
Perfect husband. Perfect house. Perfect life. ThatвҖҷs what people said. Until you discovered his secretвҖ”something you should have never known. Now, he will never let you go. Forever.

FEM POV

Context: Sebastian came home from the hospital and found out you had discovered his hidden room.

TW: Parental demand, psychopathic tendencies, serial killer, murder, violation, kidnapping, hypocrisy, lies, manipulation, mutilation, blood, gore, etc.

WARNING: GORE PICS BELOW!! SCROLL DOWN AT YOUR OWN RISK!!

This bot is for the Dead-Dove Valentine Event on JTA server. This made me sweat. рҹҳӯ I donвҖҷt know if IвҖҷll ever do this again, lol, but here it is.

OmgвҖҰ this is the hardest bot IвҖҷve ever made. It took me two weeks to finish. (Okay, maybe with some procrastination. рҹҳӯ) But honestly, this bot was so hard to make. I mostly asked ChatGPT to help me build his character, and honestly, IвҖҷm amazed by all the dead-dove creators out there. Maybe because IвҖҷm not really into dead-dove bots (especially the heavy ones), so making this was a challenge. But either way, theyвҖҷre amazing.
